title: Evidence Contract
description: The structured output a worker adapter returns after processing a Task Packet. Contains execution results, evidence items (files changed, artifacts produced), validation outcomes, and a summary. Designed to be tool-agnostic for uniform consumption by orchestrators, babysitters, and auditing tools.

task_id.description: The id of the Task Packet this evidence responds to. Must match the original task's id.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what was accomplished, why it failed, or what blocked progress.

evidence_items.description: List of concrete artifacts produced or modified by this task. Each item represents one file change or artifact.

path.description: Relative path of the changed file or artifact within the repository.

description.description: Short description of what this change contains or represents.

checksum.description: Optional content hash (e.g. SHA256) for integrity verification of generated artifacts.

validation_results.description: Results of validation commands run by the worker. Uses adapters/validation-results.schema.json for cross-runtime parity.

adapter_info.description: Metadata about the adapter that executed this task.

adapter_type.description: Which adapter implementation executed the task.

adapter_version.description: Version identifier for the adapter implementation.

runtime.description: Runtime environment the adapter ran in.

pr_info.description: Information about a Pull Request created as part of this task, if applicable.

pr_url.description: URL to the opened Pull Request.

pr_number.description: Pull Request number on the target repository.

branch.description: The branch name the PR was opened from.

base_branch.description: The base branch the PR targets.

state.description: State of the PR at time of evidence generation.

logs.description: Captured log entries from the worker execution, useful for debugging and audit.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the log entry.

context.description: Optional structured context for the log entry.

timestamps.description: Key timestamps for the task execution lifecycle.

started_at.description: When the worker began processing this task.

completed_at.description: When the worker finished and produced this evidence.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the task in milliseconds.
